summary: Fleet Portal 'Mes Reservations' Module Testing Complete. Backend: 19/19 API tests passed for My Bookings CRUD, assign/unassign drivers, send-to-zont, cancel operations. Frontend: All UI flows passed - Navigation shows both 'Reservations Zont' (renamed) and 'Mes Reservations' (new), My Bookings page with filters, expandable cards with action buttons, Create Booking form with Transfer/Dispo/Excursion tabs, booking creation workflow. Regression: Reservations Zont, Drivers, Vehicles pages all working.

issues: React hydration warnings in console from Emergent preview wrapper injecting <span> into <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.unauthorized_tests: 2/2 PASS - List and Create return 401 without auth
backend_tests.list_bookings_authenticated: PASS - Returns array of company bookings
backend_tests.create_transfer_success: PASS - Creates transfer booking with all fields
backend_tests.create_dispo_success: PASS - Creates dispo booking with hours/vehicle
backend_tests.create_excursion_success: PASS - Creates excursion booking with tour/guide
backend_tests.assign_driver: PASS - Assigns driver and changes status to 'assigned'
backend_tests.unassign_driver: PASS - Removes driver and resets status to 'new'
backend_tests.create_invalid_type: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid booking type

frontend_tests.sidebar_mes_reservations: PASS - Found 'Mes Reservations' menu item (new module)
frontend_tests.create_booking_tabs: PASS - Transfer/Dispo/Excursion tabs present and switchable
frontend_tests.transfer_tab_fields: PASS - Date, Time, Passengers, Pickup, Dropoff, Price, Comment
frontend_tests.dispo_tab_fields: PASS - Date, Time, Hours, Vehicle Model, Price, Comment
frontend_tests.excursion_tab_fields: PASS - Date, Time, Pickup, Hours, Vehicle, Tour Name, Guide Name, Price, Comment
frontend_tests.create_transfer_booking: PASS - Form submission redirects to list with success toast
frontend_tests.booking_card_expand: PASS - Clicking card expands to show details + action buttons
frontend_tests.expanded_card_details: PASS - Shows Passagers, Chauffeur status, Note
frontend_tests.assign_button: PASS - 'Affecter chauffeur' button opens driver dropdown
frontend_tests.send_zont_button: PASS - 'Envoyer vers Zont' button present for new bookings
frontend_tests.cancel_button: PASS - 'Annuler' button present for non-cancelled bookings

regression_tests.reservations_zont_page: PASS - /fleet/bookings loads with C# API data (4 reservations)
regression_tests.drivers_page: PASS - data-testid='add-driver-btn' with 'Ajouter un chauffeur' button
regression_tests.vehicles_page: PASS - data-testid='add-vehicle-btn' with 'Ajouter un vehicule' button

verified_features: Fleet Login: Email/password authentication works
Navigation: 'Reservations Zont' renamed from 'Reservations'
Navigation: 'Mes Reservations' new menu item added
My Bookings List: Shows company reservations from MongoDB
My Bookings Filters: Search, Type (Transfer/Dispo/Excursion), Status
My Bookings Count: Shows 'X reservations dans votre planning'
Booking Card: Shows type badge (blue/green/amber), status badge, addresses, price, date
Booking Expand: Click to show details (Passagers, Chauffeur, Note)
Booking Actions: Affecter chauffeur, Envoyer vers Zont, Annuler buttons
Driver Assignment Form: Dropdown with company drivers + Confirmer button
Create Booking Page: /fleet/my-bookings/new with back button
Create Booking Tabs: Transfer (blue), Dispo (green), Excursion (amber)
Transfer Fields: Date, Time, Passengers, Pickup Address, Dropoff Address, Price, Comment
Dispo Fields: Date, Time, Hours, Vehicle Model, Price, Comment
Excursion Fields: Date, Time, Pickup, Hours, Vehicle, Tour Name, Guide Name, Price, Comment
Create Booking Submit: Shows 'Reservation creee!' toast, redirects to list
Backend POST /api/fleet/my-bookings: Creates booking in MongoDB
Backend GET /api/fleet/my-bookings: Lists company bookings with filters
Backend PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/assign: Assigns driver, status='assigned'
Backend PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/unassign: Removes driver, status='new'
Backend PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/send-to-zont: status='sent_to_zont', sentToZont=true
Backend PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/cancel: status='cancelled'
Backend DELETE /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}: Deletes booking
REGRESSION: Reservations Zont page loads C# API bookings
REGRESSION: Drivers page works with add button
REGRESSION: Vehicles page works with add button
critical_code_review_comments: FleetMyBookings.js correctly implements expandable card layout with action buttons
FleetCreateBooking.js correctly toggles fields based on booking type tab
Backend fleet_my_bookings.py correctly validates required fields per booking type
Driver assignment form correctly filters to show only active drivers (isActivated=true)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
MongoDB ObjectId '_id' correctly excluded from responses
Company ID correctly extracted from JWT token for data isolation

seed_data.existing_bookings: 4 bookings in MongoDB (1 transfer sent_to_zont, 1 excursion cancelled, 1 dispo new, 1 transfer new)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mes Reservations module fully tested. DO NOT delete existing 4 bookings as they represent different statuses for testing. For testing actions, use bookings with 'new' status. Driver assignment uses Mariam saroyan. The C# API at api.zont.cab is the source for Reservations Zont page. React hydration warnings from Emergent preview wrapper are cosmetic only.

mocked_api.note: My Bookings uses MongoDB (fleet_reservations collection). Reservations Zont uses C# API proxy.
